title: Recruits Map Overhaul
description: Tactical map overhaul for Villager Recruits.
body:
Recruits Map Overhaul upgrades the [Villager Recruits](https://modrinth.com/mod/villager-recruits) tactical map with smoother controls, richer terrain detail, and more reliable map updates.

## Features

- Richer terrain rendering with biome colors, water blending, and relief shading
- Smooth mouse-anchored zooming and panning
- Wider zoom range for route editing and large-area overview
- Per-world terrain cache with changed-chunk refreshes
- Configurable player arrow style
- Optional coordinate readout and FPS overlay
- Safer admin teleport with centered `/tp` coordinates and surface Y detection

## Config

Client config: `config/recruitsmapoverhaul-client.toml`

Options include player arrow style, coordinate readout, and FPS overlay.

## Compatibility

- Villager Recruits `1.15.0`
